meta.title: Recent Developments in Cyberwarfare
meta.description: Please join Hudson Institute's Center on Economics of the Internet for an address by Gen. James Cartwright (USMC, ret.), Harold Brown Chair in Defense Policy Studies at CSIS. General Cartwright served as Commander, U.S. Strategic Command, before being nominated and appointed as the eighth Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, the nation's second-highest military officer. During his four-year tenure as Vice Chairman, spanning two presidential administrations and overseeing constant military
